title: The Real Horror
description: I just couldn't really find this one horror modpack which I had in my mind and really needed so I just made it.
body:
**You need some horror modpack that'll scare you, don't you?
Then go and download this modpack!** 
![family photo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3df3328c3a37744084209918dbd5cec499662793_0.webp)  

**In this modpack there's no overuse of dozens of similar horror mods, and no silly ones that only make you laugh! All the mods were tweaked to the oblivion to appear just the right amount of times and not get too annoying. This modpack works the best with [Hysteria shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/hysteria-shaders) (I would recommend playing around with the shader settings to tweak it to your liking) and for sure with *friends* (yes its multiplayer friendly, *_and it includes voicechat_*)!**


The sanity mod underwent the most changes with custom sanity restoring blocks and different events taking and giving you sanity were also changed.

### List of blocks and their effects that were changed:
| **Block**           | **Sanity/sec** | **Radius** (in blocks) |
|---------------------|:--------------:|:----------------------:|
| Campfire (lit)      | 0.3            | 4                      |
| Furnace (lit)       | 0.2            | 4                      |
| Lantern             | 0.05           | 2                      |
| Torch               | 0.02           | 2                      |

### List of items and their effects after use/consumption that were changed:
| **Item**            | **Sanity given** | **Cooldown in secs** |
|---------------------|:----------------:|:--------------------:|
| Pufferfish          | -5               | 0                    |
| Poisonous potato    | -5               | 0                    |
| Spider eye          | -5               | 0                    |
| Rotten flesh        | -3               | 120                  |
| Chorus fruit        | -0.3             | 0                    |
| Honey bottle        | 10               | 120                  |
| Golden carrot       | 7                | 120                  |
| Golden apple        | 12               | 120                  |
| Notch apple         | 25               | 120                  |
